compiled_state.title: As a developer, brainstorm uses ast-grep for technical self-review when available
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add ast-grep guidance to the brainstorm skill's Phase 2 Step 2.5 (Technical Self-Review) so agents use sg for structural pattern matching when validating technical feasibility and discovering existing patterns in the codebase.
**Why**: Technical self-review during brainstorm validates that proposed approaches are grounded in the actual codebase structure. Structural search finds real code patterns rather than string matches, improving the accuracy of feasibility assessments.
**Scope**:
- IN: brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 2 Step 2.5 update with sg command examples for pattern discovery, command -v sg guard, Grep fallback instruction
- OUT: Changes to other skills, ast-grep pattern config files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 2 Step 2.5 (Technical Self-Review) contains ast-grep guidance with a command -v sg guard and Grep fallback
  ← Satisfies: "Skills reference ast-grep in specific dependency discovery steps: brainstorm Phase 2 Step 2.5"
- When this story is complete, running brainstorm on a system without ast-grep installed produces no errors and falls back to Grep-based search
  ← Satisfies: "Graceful degradation"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Brainstorm skill references Step 2.5 for fidelity review — ensure the ast-grep guidance is placed in the correct substep

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] brainstorm SKILL.md Phase 2 Step 2.5 contains ast-grep guidance with command -v sg guard
- [ ] Grep fallback instruction is present when sg is unavailable
Verify: grep -q 'command -v sg' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: ast-grep guidance added with canonical guard/fallback pattern and tests
comments.author: Test
